findings.description: 5 hardcoded English strings found: 'Compliance Dashboard' (line 20), 'Overall Score' (line 56), 'Framework Compliance' (line 67), 'Compliance Score' (line 92), 'Loading' (line 311). All user-facing strings must use Custom Labels for i18n and AppExchange compliance.
findings.recommendation: Create Custom Labels (e.g., DASH_ComplianceDashboard, DASH_OverallScore, etc.) and reference them via {label.LabelName} in the template.

findings.description: 10 hardcoded English strings including 'Elaro ROI Calculator' (line 4), 'Calculate your annual compliance cost savings' (line 5), 'Your ROI Analysis' (line 65), 'Annual Time Savings' (line 70), 'Audit Cost Reduction' (line 76). No Custom Label imports exist in the JS file.
findings.recommendation: Create Custom Labels prefixed ROI_ and replace all hardcoded strings with label references.

findings.description: 13 hardcoded English strings including 'Total Events' (line 92), 'Critical' (line 98), 'High Risk' (line 104), 'Medium Risk' (line 110), 'Event Details' (line 175). No Custom Label imports in JS file.
findings.recommendation: Create Custom Labels prefixed EVT_ and reference them via expressions.

findings.description: 23 hardcoded English strings including 'Severity Distribution' (line 38), 'Framework' (line 63), 'Policy' (line 66), 'Critical Gap' (line 69), 'High Gap' (line 72). This is the worst offender. No Custom Label imports in JS file.
findings.recommendation: Create Custom Labels prefixed GRAPH_ and replace all hardcoded text content.

findings.description: 12 hardcoded English strings including 'Direct Mapping' (line 45), 'Partial Mapping' (line 49), 'No Mapping' (line 53), 'Coverage' (line 81), 'Total Controls' (line 147). No Custom Label imports in JS file.
findings.recommendation: Create Custom Labels prefixed MATRIX_ and replace all hardcoded text.

findings.description: 9 hardcoded text-between-tags plus 19 hardcoded label= attributes. Includes 'Automated Audit Evidence' (line 72), 'Alert Thresholds' (line 198), 'Configuration Summary' (line 320). No Custom Label imports in JS file.
findings.recommendation: Create Custom Labels prefixed SETUP_ for all user-facing strings and label attributes.

findings.description: 9 hardcoded text strings plus 25 hardcoded label= attributes. Includes 'Team Lead Escalation' (line 54), 'Manager Escalation' (line 97), 'No Escalation Paths' (line 183).
findings.recommendation: Create Custom Labels prefixed ESC_ for all user-facing strings.

findings.description: 5 hardcoded English table headers: 'Event Type' (line 12), 'Entity Type' (line 13), 'Entity ID' (line 14), 'Framework' (line 15), 'Timestamp' (line 16). No Custom Label imports.
findings.recommendation: Create Custom Labels prefixed EVT_ for table headers.

findings.description: 3 hardcoded strings: 'Elaro' (line 33), 'Compliance Copilot' (line 34), 'Processing your request' (line 263). No Custom Label imports.
findings.recommendation: Create Custom Labels prefixed COPILOT_ for branding and status strings.

findings.description: 4 hardcoded strings: 'Overall Compliance Score' (line 17), 'Total Gaps' (line 23), 'Critical Gaps' (line 29), 'Compliant Frameworks' (line 35). No Custom Label imports.
findings.recommendation: Create Custom Labels prefixed KPI_ for all dashboard metric labels.

findings.description: 8 hardcoded text strings including 'Issue Key' (line 32), 'Summary' (line 51), 'Priority' (line 60), 'Assignee' (line 67), 'Unassigned' (line 77). Plus 11 hardcoded label= attributes. No Custom Label imports.
findings.recommendation: Create Custom Labels prefixed JIRA_ for all user-facing strings.

findings.description: 4 hardcoded text strings including 'Trend Analysis' (line 75), 'Period' (line 85), 'Value' (line 86), 'Change' (line 87). Plus 6 hardcoded label= attributes. No Custom Label imports.
findings.recommendation: Create Custom Labels prefixed TREND_ for headings and table headers.

findings.description: 6 hardcoded text strings including 'Risk Reduction' (line 64), 'Effort' (line 68), 'Priority Score' (line 72), 'No Suggestions Yet' (line 203). Plus 15 hardcoded label= attributes.
findings.recommendation: Create Custom Labels prefixed REM_ for all user-facing strings.

findings.description: 6 hardcoded text strings including 'Report Summary' (line 68). Plus 5 hardcoded label= attributes ('Framework', 'Start Date', 'End Date', 'Generate Report', 'Export PDF'). No Custom Label imports.
findings.recommendation: Create Custom Labels prefixed RPT_ for all user-facing strings and label attributes.

findings.description: 3 hardcoded text strings: 'Completed' (line 21), 'Control' (line 91), 'Result' (line 94). Plus 5 hardcoded label= attributes including 'Retry Scan' (line 46), 'I attest that this requirement...' (line 127). No Custom Label imports.
findings.recommendation: Create Custom Labels prefixed WIZ_ for step labels and attestation text.

findings.description: 25 LWC components contain hardcoded English text between tags (142 total instances). Additionally, 39 components have hardcoded label= attributes (203 total instances). 24 of the 25 text-offending components have ZERO Custom Label imports in their JS files. This is a systemic AppExchange i18n compliance failure.
findings.recommendation: Create a comprehensive Custom Labels migration plan. Each component needs label imports in its JS file and all hardcoded strings replaced with {label.X} references. Prioritize components with the most violations: complianceGraphViewer (23), controlMappingMatrix (12), elaroEventExplorer (13), elaroROICalculator (10).

findings.category: ElaroLogger uses System.debug instead of Platform Events
findings.description: ElaroLogger.cls is documented in CLAUDE.md as using 'Platform Events (Publish Immediately mode)' but the actual implementation falls back to System.debug (lines 64-70). The Platform Event code is commented out (line 57). This means logs do NOT survive transaction rollback, which is a core architectural requirement.
findings.recommendation: Implement the Platform Event publishing path in ElaroLogger.log(). Create an Elaro_Log_Event__e Platform Event and use EventBus.publish() in Publish Immediately mode. Keep System.debug as a fallback only.

findings.description: ElaroLogger is declared as 'with sharing' but per CLAUDE.md standards, utilities should use 'inherited sharing'. As a logger, it should inherit the sharing context of its caller.
findings.recommendation: Change to 'public inherited sharing class ElaroLogger'.

findings.description: ComplianceServiceBase is declared as 'with sharing' but per CLAUDE.md standards, services and utilities should use 'inherited sharing'. As an abstract base class extended by many services, it should inherit the caller's sharing context.
findings.recommendation: Change to 'public abstract inherited sharing class ComplianceServiceBase'.

findings.description: 48 service classes use 'with sharing' instead of 'inherited sharing' as prescribed by CLAUDE.md. Services include: AlertHistoryService, AnomalyDetectionService, BenchmarkingService, CCPAConsumerRightsService, CCPADataInventoryService, CCPAOptOutService, ComplianceFrameworkService, ComplianceGraphService, ComplianceServiceBase, ComplianceServiceFactory, DataResidencyService, ElaroCCPAComplianceService, ElaroCCPADataInventoryService, ElaroComplianceCopilotService, ElaroDeliveryService, ElaroEventMonitoringService, ElaroGDPRComplianceService, ElaroGDPRDataErasureService, ElaroGDPRDataPortabilityService, ElaroGLBAPrivacyNoticeService, ElaroHIPAAComplianceService, ElaroISO27001AccessReviewService, ElaroPCIDSSComplianceService, ElaroPCIDataMaskingService, ElaroQuickActionsService, ElaroSOC2ComplianceService, ElaroShieldService, EvidenceCollectionService, GDPRBreachNotificationService, GDPRConsentManagementService, GDPRDataInventoryService, GDPRDataSubjectService, HIPAAAuditControlService, HIPAABreachNotificationService, HIPAAPrivacyRuleService, HIPAASecurityRuleService, JiraIntegrationService, NaturalLanguageQueryService, PCIAccessControlService, PCIDataProtectionService, PCILoggingService, RemediationSuggestionService, SOC2AccessReviewService, SOC2ChangeManagementService, SOC2DataRetentionService, SOC2IncidentResponseService, SegregationOfDutiesService, ServiceNowIntegration.
findings.recommendation: Change all service classes from 'with sharing' to 'inherited sharing' to match the documented standard. This is a bulk refactoring task.

findings.description: ElaroComplianceAlert.cls uses @description tags on 6 methods (lines 103, 119, 201, 211, 219, 270). Per CLAUDE.md, the @description tag should NOT be used; the description should be the first text in the comment block.
findings.recommendation: Remove all @description tags and place the description text as the first line after /** in each method's ApexDoc comment.

findings.description: PerformanceAlertEventTriggerHandler.cls uses @description tags on the class (line 2) and on method (line 11). Per CLAUDE.md, the @description tag should NOT be used.
findings.recommendation: Remove @description tags and place the description as the first text after /** in the comment block.

findings.description: 111 production classes have public methods missing @param and/or @return tags in their ApexDoc comments. Examples include: ElaroConstants.getSeverityFromRiskScore (missing both), ElaroGDPRDataErasureService.getErasureStatus (missing both), ElaroDynamicReportController.getFieldMetadata (missing both), GDPRModule.getFrameworkName (missing both). This is a systemic gap.
findings.recommendation: Add @param and @return tags to all public/global methods. Prioritize @AuraEnabled methods first as they are the public API surface.

findings.description: The CI/CD pipeline (elaro-ci.yml) has no Apex test execution step. It runs LWC Jest tests and security scans but never executes 'sf apex run test'. Apex test coverage is a Quality Gate per CLAUDE.md (85%+ per class).
findings.recommendation: Add an Apex test job that creates a scratch org, deploys source, and runs 'sf apex run test --test-level RunLocalTests --code-coverage' with a coverage threshold check.

findings.category: CI/CD - Security scan excludes healthcheck package
findings.description: All 4 'sf scanner run' commands in the security-scan job target only 'force-app/' but not 'force-app-healthcheck/'. The healthcheck package (13 production classes, 6 LWC components) is completely excluded from security scanning.
findings.recommendation: Update scanner targets to include both packages: '--target force-app/ --target force-app-healthcheck/' or use a pattern that covers both.

findings.category: Missing SECURITY keyword in without sharing documentation
findings.description: ElaroAuditTrailPoller uses 'without sharing' with documentation ('Runs in system context to poll audit trail regardless of user permissions') but does not use the SECURITY keyword as other classes do. This makes automated security scanning inconsistent.
findings.recommendation: Update the documentation comment to include 'SECURITY:' prefix for consistency: 'SECURITY: without sharing required because...'.

findings.description: 6 LWC components use inline style= attributes instead of SLDS classes. complianceGraphViewer (8 occurrences), complianceCopilot (8 occurrences), elaroReadinessScore (1), elaroSetupWizard (2), jiraCreateModal (1), remediationSuggestionCard (1). Per CLAUDE.md: 'No custom CSS unless SLDS cannot cover it.'
findings.recommendation: Replace inline styles with SLDS utility classes or component-level CSS custom properties where SLDS coverage is insufficient.

findings.description: CommandCenterController.cls contains 'System.debug' on line 250, but this is within an @example tag in an ApexDoc comment, not in executable code. While not a runtime issue, it sets a bad example in documentation.
findings.recommendation: Replace the System.debug in the @example with an ElaroLogger call to maintain consistency with coding standards even in documentation.

findings.category: Hardcoded English in LWC - label attributes
findings.description: elaroAiSettings has 6 hardcoded label= attributes: 'Enable AI Reasoning' (line 21), 'Require Human Approval for HIGH+ Risk' (line 29), 'Enable Auto-Remediation (DANGER: Bypasses human review)' (line 37), 'AI Confidence Threshold' (line 45), 'Blacklisted Users' (line 59). No Custom Label imports.
findings.recommendation: Create Custom Labels prefixed AI_ for all settings labels. Critical for i18n compliance.

findings.category: Hardcoded English in LWC - label attributes
findings.description: elaroAuditPackageBuilder has 5 hardcoded label= attributes: 'Package Name' (line 5), 'Framework' (line 12), 'Audit Period Start' (line 21), 'Audit Period End' (line 29), 'Generate Audit Package' (line 36). No Custom Label imports.
findings.recommendation: Create Custom Labels prefixed AUDIT_ for all form labels.

findings.file: force-app/main/default/lwc/ (39 components with hardcoded label= attributes)
findings.category: Hardcoded English in LWC - label attributes summary
findings.description: 39 LWC components across both packages have hardcoded English strings in label= attributes (203 total instances). These are lightning-input, lightning-button, lightning-combobox, lightning-progress-step, and lightning-badge label attributes with English text that should use Custom Label references. Components with the most violations: escalationPathConfig (25), elaroAuditWizard (21), elaroSetupWizard (19), remediationSuggestionCard (15), onCallScheduleManager (14).
findings.recommendation: For each component, import Custom Labels in the JS file and bind label attributes to label expressions: label={label.MY_LABEL}.

findings.category: Positive: All abstract/override methods have access modifiers
findings.description: All abstract methods in CalloutStep, ComplianceServiceBase, ComputeStep, DMLStep, CursorStep and all override methods in HIPAABreachNotificationService, HIPAAPrivacyRuleService, HIPAASecurityRuleService, HIPAAAuditControlService, CCPAConsumerRightsService, etc. correctly have explicit public/protected access modifiers. v65.0+ requirement is satisfied.
findings.recommendation: No action needed. Maintain this standard for new code.

findings.description: All 21 controller classes correctly use 'with sharing': AIGovernanceController, ApiUsageDashboardController, AssessmentWizardController, AuditReportController, CommandCenterController, ComplianceDashboardController, ComplianceScoreCardController, ElaroAISettingsController, ElaroDashboardController, ElaroDrillDownController, ElaroDynamicReportController, ElaroExecutiveKPIController, ElaroMatrixController, ElaroPDFController, ElaroTrendController, EscalationPathController, OnCallScheduleController, RuleEngineController, SECDisclosureController, TrustCenterController, TrustCenterGuestController.
findings.recommendation: No action needed.

findings.description: All 216 production Apex classes across both packages have @group tags in their ApexDoc. This was verified with zero missing.
findings.recommendation: No action needed.

findings.description: 7 CI/CD workflows configured: elaro-ci.yml (main pipeline), codebase-review.yml (Solentra review), salesforce-review.yml (AI code review), codeql.yml (CodeQL analysis), auto-merge-pr.yml, close-stale-prs.yml, pr-status-monitor.yml. Good coverage of quality gates.
findings.recommendation: Address the missing Apex test stage (ARCH-024) and healthcheck scan gap (ARCH-025) to complete the pipeline.

findings.category: Positive: All LWC components have Jest tests
findings.description: All 58 LWC components in the main package and all 6 in the healthcheck package have associated Jest test files. Zero components missing tests.
findings.recommendation: No action needed.

findings.category: Positive: Most without sharing classes properly documented
findings.description: 7 of 9 'without sharing' classes have security documentation explaining why system-level access is needed: ComplianceAlertPublisher, ElaroEventPublisher, ElaroInstallHandler, ElaroReasoningEngine, ElaroScoreCallback, RuleEngineEventBridge, SchedulerErrorHandler, TrustCenterDataService. Only ElaroAuditTrailPoller uses informal documentation instead of the SECURITY keyword.
findings.recommendation: Standardize all without sharing documentation to use the SECURITY keyword prefix.

findings.category: Hardcoded English in LWC - Healthcheck package
findings.description: healthCheckDashboard has hardcoded label='Run Scan' (line 5). healthCheckRiskTable has hardcoded label='Filter by severity' (line 5). These are in the separate healthcheck 2GP and also require Custom Labels for i18n.
findings.recommendation: Create Custom Labels prefixed HC_ in force-app-healthcheck/main/default/labels/ for all healthcheck component strings.
